svg.title: HyperWeave Data Connectors — 11 providers, 9 live.
svg.desc: Compact README connector registry for the ?data= grammar: provider glyph and prefix, source, identifier shape, the metrics each exposes, and live-vs-literal kind. 11 connectors, 9 live and 2 literal. Token format provider:id.metric. The full per-provider metric vocabulary, grammar and cache policy are in the embedded hw.connectors/1 payload (the markdown/text shadow); a compressed hwz/1 envelope is also embedded.

g.text: live tokens cache 5–10 min · failure → — sentinel · per-provider breaker

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Render the connector registry as a README-scale, scannable instrument re-themed to the format-comparison readme: same masthead, palette, chip language and live indicator, sized to embed without dominating the page.
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Reduce the 859x799 matrix to 900x626. Two readability moves: uniform row height (replaces the variable per-row heights that grew to fit wrapped chips) and single-line metric chips with a +N overflow (replaces 2-row chip wrapping). Provider brand glyphs are kept, rendered monochrome in genome ink (Symphony Doctrine). Azure is chrome only — count chip, LIVE tags, reading rail, ?data= highlight. Alternating row tint aids horizontal tracking across 11 rows. All column widths and chip packing are derived from measured JetBrains Mono / Barlow advances.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: The canvas now shows a representative metric set + a +N overflow rather than every chip; the complete per-provider vocabulary stays lossless in the hw.connectors/1 payload (the markdown/text shadow), so nothing is lost for an agent or a screen reader — only the visual is summarised. Kept glyphs in ink rather than brand color for genome coherence; a brand-tint toggle remains the obvious follow-up. Filled cells carry no intermediate-luminance stroke (the dark-mode blur fix from the format-comparison readme): chip edges read crisp on both paper and near-black.
hw:reasoning.hw:spatial-notes: ViewBox 900x626, ~78% of the source height. Five columns on a left-to-right axis: provider x=28 (glyph 22px + prefix), source x=168, identifier x=300 (mono inset chip), metrics x=452 (the only packing zone, single line + overflow), kind right-aligned to x=872. Uniform row pitch 42px x11 (was variable, min 46). Masthead 88px, column-header band to y=124, score/footer seam at y=586. Azure reading rail anchors the body left edge; alternating row tint at low opacity tracks across rows.

hw:lineage.hw:note: Same hw.connectors/1 registry as the full matrix; this is a presentational reduction (compact README scale, uniform rows, summarised metrics) — not a data change. Trajectory pair for the spatial model: matrix (859x799, variable rows, full chips) -> readme-compact (900x626, uniform rows, +N overflow).

hw:artifact.hw:payload: {"schema":"hw.connectors/1","grammar":{"query":"?data=<tok>[,<tok>…]","token":"<provider>:<id>.<metric> | text:<v> | kv:<K=V>","escape":"embedded commas in text:/kv: escape as \\,"},"cache":{"ttl_s":[300,600],"fail_ttl_s":60,"sentinel":"—","breaker":"per-provider"},"connectors":[{"p":["gh","github"],"src":"GitHub","id":"owner/repo","kind":"live","m":["stars","forks","watchers","issues","license","language","build"]},{"p":["pypi"],"src":"PyPI + pepy.tech","id":"package","kind":"live","m":["version","license","python_requires","downloads"]},{"p":["npm"],"src":"npm registry","id":"package","kind":"live","m":["version","license","downloads"]},{"p":["crates","cargo"],"src":"crates.io","id":"crate","kind":"live","m":["version","downloads","recent_downloads","license"]},{"p":["hf","huggingface"],"src":"HuggingFace Hub","id":"org/model","kind":"live","m":["downloads","likes","tags","pipeline_tag","library_name","license","gated","last_modified"]},{"p":["docker"],"src":"Docker Hub","id":"namespace/repo","kind":"live","m":["pull_count","star_count","last_updated"]},{"p":["arxiv"],"src":"arXiv API","id":"id · 2310.06825","kind":"live","m":["title","authors","published","updated","categories","summary","journal_ref","doi"]},{"p":["scorecard"],"src":"OpenSSF Scorecard","id":"owner/repo","kind":"live","m":["score","code_review","maintained","vulnerabilities","token_permissions","…"]},{"p":["dora"],"src":"GitHub Actions","id":"owner/repo","kind":"live","m":["deploy_frequency","lead_time","change_failure_rate","mttr"]},{"p":["text"],"src":"literal","id":"—","kind":"literal","m":["renders payload as displayed text"]},{"p":["kv"],"src":"literal","id":"KEY=VALUE","kind":"literal","m":["static role-tagged value"]}]}
hw:artifact.hw:envelope: {"v":"hwz/1","id":"sha256:a505039b80e02d77","k":"reference-table","ttok":479,"ref":"hw://doc/a505039b#payload","title":"HyperWeave Data Connectors","variant":"readme-compact","intent":"Connector registry for the ?data= grammar: provider prefixes, identifier shapes, and the metrics each exposes.","state":"stable","data":{"connectors_n":11,"live":9,"literal":2,"token_fmt":"<provider>:<id>.<metric>","prefixes":["gh","pypi","npm","crates","hf","docker","arxiv","scorecard","dora","text","kv"],"sentinel":"—"},"frames":[{"t":"matrix","l":"data connectors","rows":11,"cols":5}],"prov":{"by":"hyperweave","ver":"0.4.0","genome":"brutalist.azure","ts":"2026-06-06"}}
